# 💰 Expense Tracker - Full Stack Project

## 📌 Project Title & Description

This is a full-stack **Expense Tracker Application** built using **React (frontend)** and **Node.js + Express (backend)**.  
The application allows users to add, edit, delete, filter, and analyze their expenses. It also includes a summary dashboard, category-based filtering, charts, CSV export, and dark mode support.

The goal of this project is to demonstrate full-stack development skills including REST API design, frontend state management, and UI/UX design.

---

## 🌐 Live Demo Links

- Frontend (Vercel): https://your-frontend-link.vercel.app  
- Backend (Render): https://your-backend-link.onrender.com  

---

## 🛠 Tech Stack

### Frontend:
- React.js → Component-based UI development
- Axios → API communication
- React Toastify → Notifications
- CSS → Styling & responsive UI

### Backend:
- Node.js → Runtime environment
- Express.js → Backend framework
- File System (fs) → Data storage using JSON file

### Why this stack?
- React enables fast UI updates and reusable components
- Express provides lightweight and fast API development
- JSON-based storage keeps backend simple for demonstration

---
